title: dioscorea matagalpensis
intro: Dioscorea matagalpensis is a species of yam that is native to Central and South America, belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dioscorea matagalpensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as arthritis, hypertension, and even some types of cancer. Dioscorea matagalpensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw or cooked like a regular yam.
